lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bharam chukaaeaa sadaa sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Dispelling their doubts, they find a lasting peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਭੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਭੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa rahai bhai andar bhai maar bharam chukaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Night and day, they remain in the Fear of God; conquering their fears, their doubts are dispelled. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਹਜੇ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar niramal niramal baanee har gun sahaje gaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Deep within, they are pure, and their words are pure as well; intuitively, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad param pad paaeaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the supreme status is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolaa tat na jaanai |
lines.english: but deluded by doubt, they do not understand the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਬੇਦ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasat bed vakhaanai |
lines.english: They recite the Simritees, the Shaastras and the Vedas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਦੁਖੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve sukh na paae dukho dukh kamaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, they find no peace; they earn only pain and misery. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap kare kis aakhai koee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself acts; unto whom should we complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੭॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak aape kare karaae naame naam samaavaniaa |8|7|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself does, and causes things to be done; chanting the Naam, we are absorbed in the Naam. ||8||7||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan jaaeeai je bhoolaa hoee |
lines.english: How can anyone complain that the Lord has made a mistake?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape range sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: He Himself imbues us with His Love, with effortless ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har rang charraae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we are dyed in the color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree nirbhau man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Fearless Lord within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਰਸਨਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੀ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man tan rataa rasanaa rang chaloolee bhai bhaae rang charraavaniaa |1|
lines.english: This mind and body are so imbued, and this tongue is dyed in the deep crimson color of the poppy. Through the Love and the Fear of God, we are dyed in this color. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te har nirbhau dhiaaeaa bikh bhaujal sabad taraavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I meditate on the Fearless Lord; the Shabad has carried me across the poisonous world-ocean. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਕਰਹਿ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mugadh kareh chaturaaee |
lines.english: The idiotic self-willed manmukhs try to be clever,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਆਇਆ ਤੇਹਾ ਜਾਸੀ ਕਰਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਪਛੋਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jehaa aaeaa tehaa jaasee kar avagan pachhotaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: As they came, so shall they go, regretting the mistakes they made. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਤਾ ਧੋਤਾ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naataa dhotaa thaae na paaee |
lines.english: but in spite of their bathing and washing, they shall not be acceptable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੇ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe kichhoo na soojhai |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not understand anything;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ਆਏ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: maran likhaae aae nahee boojhai |
lines.english: death was pre-ordained for them when they came into the world, but they do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kare nahee paae bin naavai janam gavaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs may practice religious rituals, but they do not obtain the Name; without the Name, they lose this life in vain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach karanee sabad hai saar |
lines.english: The practice of Truth is the essence of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: poorai gur paaeeai mokh duaar |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, the gate of salvation is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin baanee sabad sunaae sach raate rang rangaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: So, night and day, listen to the Word of the Guru's Bani, and the Shabad. Let yourself be colored by this love. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mohiaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: My mind and body are enticed by the Lord's Sublime Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa har ras raatee rang laae |
lines.english: The tongue, imbued with the Lord's Essence, delights in His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sahaje preetam piaaraa paaeaa sahaje sehaj milaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: I have easily obtained my Darling Beloved; I am intuitively absorbed in celestial peace. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sahaje sukh samaavai |
lines.english: through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are intuitively absorbed in celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਸੋਈ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis andar rang soee gun gaavai |
lines.english: Those who have the Lord's Love within, sing His Glorious Praises;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸਦਾ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree sadaa tin vittahu gur sevaa chit laavaniaa |6|
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who dedicate their consciousness to the Guru's Service. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee andar bheejai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one's inner being is deeply imbued with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਚੋ ਸਚਿ ਪਤੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sacho sach pateejai |
lines.english: The True Lord is pleased with Truth, and only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਸਿ ਸੁਥਾਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਮਨਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bais suthaan har gun gaaveh aape kar sat manaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Sitting in that blessed place, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, who Himself inspires us to accept His Truth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare so paae |
lines.english: That one, upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, obtains it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੮॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai man antar dar sachai sobhaa paavaniaa |8|8|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, that one, within whose mind the Name dwells, is honored in the True Court. ||8||8||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee haumai jaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, egotism departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai vaddee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru is the greatest greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jee achint vasai man aaee |
lines.english: The Dear Lord automatically comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਫਲਿਓ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੀਤਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਖਾ ਲਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har jeeo safalio birakh hai amrit jin peetaa tis tikhaa lahaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Dear Lord is the fruit-bearing tree; drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar, thirst is quenched. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sach sangat mel milaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to the one who leads me to join the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har satasangat aape melai gurasabadee har gun gaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord Himself unites me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
